matrix_shader_config.global_blend_strategy: Frequency-split with Additive highs + Screen mids + controlled base underlay.

blend_layers.blend_optimization_note: Base layer carries the core canvas without overmixing.
Overlay balances color pop with scene detail.
Accent layer uses Screen to avoid harsh overdraw.
Base layer carries the core canvas without overmixing.
Build section uses contrast-driven mid texture.
Accent layer uses Screen to avoid harsh overdraw.
Base layer carries the core canvas without overmixing.
Overlay balances color pop with scene detail.
Top transient layer pushes impact for drops and accents.
Base layer carries the core canvas without overmixing.
Overlay balances color pop with scene detail.
Accent layer uses Screen to avoid harsh overdraw.
Base layer carries the core canvas without overmixing.
Overlay balances color pop with scene detail.
Breakdown keeps highlights soft without clipping.

spatial_layer_mapping.stereo_mapping: left/right matrix emphasis follows matrix center X ordering.
spatial_layer_mapping.depth_mapping: primary matrix carries transient layers; secondary matrices carry ambient layers.

blend_summary.blend_mode_intent: Use Additive/Screen for high-energy accents, Multiply/Normal for calmer sections.
blend_summary.off_effect_safety: Use Transparent/Canvas mode for top shader layers to avoid black overwrite artifacts.

video_data.sync_tip: Use video motion to boost top-layer particle bursts on the matrix.
video_data.preview_video_suggestion: Render a matrix-only MP4 preview and compare to the source song.

matrix_intelligence.recommended_layering: Base ambient + mid matrix core + top transient accents (cap at 3 layers on large matrices).

responsible_use.notice: Helix creators are not responsible for misuse of training workflows or sequence data.
responsible_use.copyright_warning: Do not train on licensed third-party sequences or proprietary show files without explicit rights.
responsible_use.build_rule: During build and tuning, use only assets you own or are licensed to use.
responsible_use.user_context_note: User-supplied Suno-generated tracks are acceptable when rights are held under your plan.

time_layers.future: ghosted pulses and translucent foreshadow geometry
time_layers.present: bright impact flashes and lyric hits
time_layers.past: smoke-like decay ribbons and fading trail particles

focus_strategy.verse: reduce to melody, vocal, and pad anchors
focus_strategy.chorus: open the full stage and mirror stereo across left and right zones
focus_strategy.breakdown: hold focal props and leave background props breathing
focus_strategy.drop: expand from bass foundations into full-width accents

responsible_use.notice: Helix creators are not responsible for misuse of training workflows or sequence data.
responsible_use.copyright_warning: Do not train on licensed third-party sequences or proprietary show files without explicit rights.
responsible_use.build_rule: During build and tuning, use only assets you own or are licensed to use.
responsible_use.user_context_note: User-supplied Suno-generated tracks are acceptable when rights are held under your plan.

notes: Added 40 breathing fades around quiet or transition windows.
Applied 2 color-flow transitions near section boundaries.

strengths: Strong scene architecture and phrase-aware placement.
Good prop-family coverage across the available layout.
Validation stayed disciplined, with low conflict fallout.
Detail capacity is being used, not just whole-prop blocks.
cautions: Effect density is still pushing busy; consider fewer simultaneous accents.
